summary: Completed testing of Gig/Route management updates. All requested features are working correctly: Auto-Create Gig button is removed, orders auto-assign to gigs based on service zone, Assign Driver modal allows multi-select of specific orders, Unassign button resets orders to 'new' status, and toast notifications appear in bottom-right corner system-wide.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Toast Test Gig and TEST_Manual Gig for testing. Manhattan Morning Route used for assign/unassign flow testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All gig/route management features verified working. Service zones are configured for NYC boroughs (Manhattan, Queens, Brooklyn, Bronx, Staten Island). Orders auto-assign to gigs based on city matching service zone name. Toast notification system uses #toast-container positioned bottom-right with animations.

features_tested.Auto-Create Gig button removed: PASS - Button not present on Routes page, only manual '+ Create Gig' button exists
features_tested.Orders auto-assign to gigs based on serv: PASS - API test verified orders get assigned to gigs matching city/zone
features_tested.Assign Driver modal multi-select orders: PASS - Modal shows checkboxes for each order with Select All/Deselect All buttons
features_tested.Unassign Driver button: PASS - Button appears after driver is assigned, clicking resets orders to 'new' status
features_tested.Toast notifications bottom-right corner: PASS - Toast container positioned at x=1725, y=1003 (bottom-right of 1920px viewport)
features_tested.Toast notifications on Orders page: PASS - 'Order updated!' toast appears after saving order
features_tested.Toast notifications on Routes page: PASS - 'Gig created!', '5 orders assigned to Test Driver', 'Driver unassigned from 5 orders' toasts all appeared

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/routes - PASS (lists all gigs with orderCount, driverCount)
GET /api/routes/{id} - PASS (returns gig details with orders and drivers)
GET /api/routes/pending-orders - PASS (returns orders not in any gig)
POST /api/routes/{id}/assign-orders-to-driver - PASS (assigns selected orders to driver)
POST /api/orders - PASS (creates order and auto-assigns to gig based on zone)
ui_flows_tested: Routes page - No Auto-Create Gig button present
Routes page - Create Gig modal opens on button click
Routes page - Toast appears on gig creation
Assign Driver modal - Shows driver dropdown and order checkboxes
Assign Driver modal - Select All/Deselect All buttons work
Assign Driver - Orders assigned, toast appears, Unassign button appears
Unassign Driver - Orders reset, toast appears
Orders page - Edit order, Save, toast appears
